---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

A full list of my publications and conference contributions.

---

## Journal Articles

::: {.pub-entry}
**CADTEP: A new daily quality-controlled and homogenized climate database for Catalonia (1950–2021)**  
Prohom M, Domonkos P, Cunillera J, Barrera-Escoda T, Busto M, Herrero-Anaya M, **Aparicio A**, Reynés J  
*International Journal of Climatology*, 2023  
[{{< fa link >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.8116)

::: {.cite-block}
```bibtex
@article{prohom2023cadtep,
  author  = {Prohom, M. and Domonkos, P. and Cunillera, J. and Barrera-Escoda, T.
             and Busto, M. and Herrero-Anaya, M. and Aparicio, A. and Reynés, J.},
  title   = {CADTEP: A new daily quality-controlled and homogenized climate
             database for Catalonia (1950--2021)},
  journal = {International Journal of Climatology},
  year    = {2023},
  doi     = {10.1002/joc.8116}
}
```
:::
:::

---

## Book Chapters & Other Publications

::: {.pub-entry}
**Història del fons d'observacions meteorològiques del far de Sant Sebastià**  
**Aparicio, A.**  
*Estudis del Baix Empordà*, (35), pp. 185–195, 2016
:::

---

## Conference Contributions

### 2025

::: {.pub-entry}
**Optimizing Climate Services for High-Demand Use Cases: the Experience of Meteorological Service of Catalonia with Insurance-Related Reports**  
**Aparicio, A.**  
*15th EUMETNET Data Management Workshop "Shaping Climate Services for the Future"*  
📅 4–6 November 2025 · 📍 Oslo, Norway (online presentation)
:::

### 2024

::: {.pub-entry}
**Enhancing meteorological report access and response time: How the Meteorological Service of Catalonia addresses the rise in weather-related claims**  
**Aparicio, A.**  
*EMS Annual Meeting 2024*  
[{{< fa link >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.5194/ems2024-234)  
🏆 *Outstanding Poster Award*
:::

### 2022

::: {.pub-entry}
**A very high spatial resolution database for heating and cooling degree-days in Catalonia (1971–2100): observations and climate projections**  
**Aparicio, A.**, Altava-Ortiz, V., Barberia, L., Barrera-Escoda, A., and Rius, A.  
*EMS Annual Meeting 2022*, Bonn, Germany, 5–9 Sep 2022  
[{{< fa link >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.5194/ems2022-412)
:::

### 2019

::: {.pub-entry}
**Lessons learnt applying a daily quality control on temperature and precipitation series**  
Cunillera, J.; Prohom, M.; Llabrés Brustenga, A.; Barrera, T.; **Aparicio, A.**; Busto, M.  
*12th EUMETNET Data Management Workshop 2019*
:::

### 2018

::: {.pub-entry}
**ARTYDOC, a new digital archive of meteorological documentation**  
Prohom, M.; Herrero, M.; **Aparicio, A.**  
*EMS Annual Meeting 2018*  
[{{< fa link >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.22745.16487)
:::
